arts.ttl: Big problem brewing for Chelsea as 10-goal hit-man isn’t happy
arts.sum: Chelsea are flying this season in the Premier League but 10-goal striker, Christopher Nkunku, still isn’t happy and could ask for a transfer away as early as the January transfer window. Injuries have blighted the Frenchman’s time at Stamford Bridge, and a potential move to rivals Man United has even been mooted. arts.ttl: Expected Chelsea XI vs Leicester as Madueke starts while Sancho returns to squad
arts.sum: "First of all, excited and also thankful because it was a fantastic season," Maresca said on Thursday when asked how he feels returning to Leicester, where he won the 2023/24 Championship title. "It was a fantastic season because I met good people and then in terms of players, it was top, it was fantastic.

arts.ttl: Chelsea turn to hugely underwhelming striker target after admitting defeat in Osimhen and Isak chase
arts.sum: Chelsea have seemingly finally admitted defeat in the chase for Napoli’s on-loan ace, Victor Osimhen, and Newcastle’s Alexander Isak, though their new striking target may leave fans distinctly underwhelmed, with respect. arts.ttl: 'I think': Stan Collymore predicts the score for Leicester vs Chelsea in the Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea are back in action this afternoon against Leicester City as domestic football returns after the international break. The Blues have travelled to the East...

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall's true feelings clear ahead of Leicester City return
arts.sum: Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall has already revealed that he will not celebrate if he plays and scores against boyhood club Leicester City for Chelsea this weekend. Both Dewsbury-Hall and Maresca will return to the King Power Stadium for the first time since their exits on Saturday as the two teams meet in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca makes his first return to Leicester as Chelsea take on the Foxes at the King Power Stadium this weekend. Maresca led Leicester to promotion to the Premier League last season before departing to take charge at Chelsea. arts.ttl: Leicester City vs Chelsea Premier League score predicted as Enzo Maresca haunts former side
arts.sum: After a two-week international break, Chelsea return to action this weekend, with the Blues facing Enzo Maresca's former side, Leicester City. Chelsea and Leicester City will go head to head in the Premier League early kick-off later today, where the Blues have the chance to move six points off top of the league.

arts.ttl: Juventus Set Sights on Out-of-Favor Chelsea Midfielder
arts.sum: Serie A giants Juventus have reportedly added Chelsea outcast Cesare Casadei to their list of targets ahead of the winter transfer window. According to Calciomercato, the record-time Italian champions see the 21-year-old as a favorable market opportunity after he tumbled down the pecking order at Stamford Bridge. The post Juventus Set Sights on Out-of-Favor Chelsea Midfielder appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Reece James injury update as Chelsea star faces anxious wait over latest hamstring problem
arts.sum: Reece James will have a scan on his latest hamstring injury next week, football.london understands. Enzo Maresca confirmed on Thursday afternoon that James will not take any part in Saturday's Premier League trip to Leicester City but the head coach was hopeful the injury would not be another long-term setback for his captain.

arts.ttl: 'I am so angry with how I was treated at Chelsea and relieved to have finally quit club'
arts.sum: Danny Drinkwater admits that he wasted some of his best footballing years after making the move from Leicester to Chelsea in 2017, making just 23 appearances with the west London outfit in his five-year tenure
